headline: Fragile China-US Tech Truce Tested by Tungsten Hunt
narrative: The simmering China-US tech truce looks increasingly tenuous as Beijing accelerates its global hunt for critical minerals like tungsten. This dual-track approach—negotiating a fragile ceasefire on technology while aggressively securing supply chains—captures the day's strategic picture. Domestically, the anti-corruption apparatus remains active with the investigation of a county party secretary, while regulators tighten control over youth entertainment (age restrictions for escape rooms) and exam security (Gaokao warnings). Meanwhile, state-backed capital flows into sustainable materials and elderly hardware signal alignment with industrial policy priorities.
narrative_zh: 中美科技休战看似摇摇欲坠，北京加速全球寻找钨等关键矿产资源。这种双轨策略——一方面谈判技术休战，另一方面积极保障供应链安全——勾勒出今日战略图景。国内，反腐机器继续运转，一名县委书记被调查；监管机构收紧对青少年娱乐（密室逃脱年龄限制）和高考安全的控制。同时，国有资本流向可持续材料和老年硬件，显示与产业政策优先方向一致。
